name: See Midsummer Night's Stars Again
overview: Lin Xiaoxia, a small-town girl with big dreams of becoming a jewelry designer, hides her true self behind a facade due to life's challenges. Her world changes when she meets Lu Yize, a carefree heir to a jewelry empire. Despite their differences, their friendship inspires Lin Xiaoxia to pursue her passion and helps Lu Yize rediscover the value of his family's legacy.
